Procs

proc gamepadFilterDeadZone(value: float32): float32 {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Filters small axis values to zero. Source   Edit   
proc gamepadResetState(state: var GamepadState) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Resets the gamepad state to a disconnected default. Source   Edit   
proc toGamepad(state: GamepadState; id: int): Gamepad {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Converts an internal gamepad state into a public gamepad snapshot. Source   Edit
